summary: Games Tab | Hearing Announcement When Navigating to a Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Games tab
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates down from the Games tab
AND the user focuses on the first game tile
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “In the games carousel, <Title of Video Stream>, Press select to play, X of X items”
